name: Can I clean up sewage damage myself in Los Angeles County, or should I hire a pro?

mainEntity.name: Can I clean up sewage damage myself in Los Angeles County, or should I hire a pro?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. DIRECT ANSWER: DIY cleanup is unsafe and often fails because household cleaners can't kill sewage pathogens, leading to mold and illness. 2. CONTEXT: Pros use industrial-grade disinfectants and extraction machines that homeowners don't have. 3. KEY FACTORS: - Household sprays are ineffective against sewage bacteria. - Wet vacuums can't remove all waste from carpets. - Mold grows if drying isn't perfect. - Insurance may deny DIY claims. 4. PRACTICAL GUIDANCE: Only hire a certified pro; DIY risks your health and home value. 5. SOFT POSITIONING: Saving money now could cost you thousands in mold repairs later.
acceptedAnswer.description: Hire a pro; DIY is unsafe, ineffective against pathogens, and often leads to mold and insurance denial.

description: Hire a pro; DIY is unsafe, ineffective against pathogens, and often leads to mold and insurance denial.
